symptom: Token Expired spike after auth-service key rotation
root_cause: JWKS cache kept an old signing key after key rotation
resolution: Refresh JWKS cache and rollback signing key set

symptom: 401 surge during login after KMS latency increase
root_cause: auth-service timed out when loading signing material from kms-service
resolution: Increase KMS timeout budget and warm signing key cache

symptom: Token validation failed for a single availability zone
root_cause: gateway node clock skew exceeded token leeway
resolution: Resync NTP and restart affected gateway pods

symptom: Session lookup timeout caused intermittent Token Expired errors
root_cause: redis-session memory pressure triggered eviction and slow queries
resolution: Scale Redis shard and reduce session TTL churn

symptom: User profile API returned 500 after schema migration
root_cause: mysql-user migration missed nullable default for legacy rows
resolution: Backfill legacy rows and deploy guarded ORM mapping

symptom: Checkout failed with payment timeout
root_cause: payment-service connection pool exhausted
resolution: Raise pool size and add circuit breaker around payment call

symptom: Risk verification timed out for high-value payments
root_cause: risk-service dependency had degraded p95 latency
resolution: Enable async risk fallback for low confidence cases

symptom: Inventory reservation returned stale stock count
root_cause: cache invalidation event was dropped during deploy
resolution: Replay inventory events and add idempotent invalidation

symptom: Large request bodies failed with 413
root_cause: gateway body limit changed during config rollout
resolution: Restore route-specific body limit and add config diff check

symptom: Refresh token exchange produced invalid audience
root_cause: auth-service used stale tenant audience config
resolution: Reload tenant config and add config version metric

symptom: Token Expired errors after blue-green deployment
root_cause: new user-center pods used shorter JWKS cache refresh interval incorrectly
resolution: Align JWKS cache TTL and force refresh on key id miss

symptom: User lookup p99 latency exceeded SLO
root_cause: missing index on tenant_id and user_id
resolution: Create composite index and verify slow query log

symptom: Login sessions disappeared after failover
root_cause: replica promotion lost recent session writes
resolution: Tune Redis replication policy and enable write acknowledgement

symptom: Intermittent 502 on user-center route
root_cause: gateway upstream endpoints included terminating pods
resolution: Tighten readiness probe and drain endpoints before shutdown

symptom: Signing key fetch failed for auth-service
root_cause: KMS rate limit exceeded after auth-service restart storm
resolution: Add exponential backoff and prefetch key material

symptom: Order creation duplicated during retry storm
root_cause: idempotency key was not propagated through gateway
resolution: Propagate idempotency key and reject duplicate order intents

symptom: Payment callback signature validation failed
root_cause: provider certificate rotation was not loaded
resolution: Refresh certificate bundle and add expiration alert

symptom: Risk score endpoint returned empty decision
root_cause: model feature store returned null features
resolution: Fallback to last-known feature set and alert feature null rate

symptom: Stock lock never released for canceled orders
root_cause: cancel event consumer lagged behind order-service
resolution: Scale consumer and add dead-letter replay dashboard

symptom: Password reset links expired immediately
root_cause: token issued with seconds but validated as milliseconds
resolution: Normalize timestamp units and add contract test

symptom: JWT kid not found during canary
root_cause: canary auth-service published key id before JWKS propagation
resolution: Delay key activation until JWKS propagation completes

symptom: Mobile clients saw unauthorized responses only
root_cause: mobile route used old issuer allowlist
resolution: Update issuer allowlist and add route config parity check

symptom: Session refresh wrote inconsistent TTL
root_cause: mixed client versions computed TTL differently
resolution: Pin client version and add TTL invariant test

symptom: Deadlocks during user preference update
root_cause: batch job and API updated rows in opposite order
resolution: Standardize lock order and reduce batch size

symptom: Token Expired after daylight saving time change
root_cause: gateway and auth-service used inconsistent timezone libraries
resolution: Use UTC everywhere and add clock skew metrics

symptom: Cart checkout returned stale price
root_cause: price cache invalidation delayed after promotion update
resolution: Shorten cache TTL and publish promotion invalidation events

symptom: Partial captures failed for split payments
root_cause: provider API version mismatch
resolution: Pin provider API version and add compatibility check

symptom: Risk service returned 429 to payment-service
root_cause: payment retry policy amplified risk requests
resolution: Add retry budget and local decision cache

symptom: Reservation endpoint p95 doubled
root_cause: database connection leak after inventory deploy
resolution: Patch connection handling and add pool saturation alert

symptom: CORS errors on web-console login
root_cause: gateway CORS config lost auth callback origin
resolution: Restore callback origin and add synthetic login check

symptom: OAuth callback rejected valid state parameter
root_cause: state secret rotated without dual-read period
resolution: Support previous state secret during rotation window

symptom: User creation failed with duplicate external id
root_cause: idempotency lookup skipped tenant namespace
resolution: Scope external id by tenant and backfill duplicates

symptom: Redis CPU saturated during login campaign
root_cause: session key scan job ran during peak traffic
resolution: Move scan job to off-peak and replace SCAN pattern

symptom: KMS decrypt latency caused auth startup delay
root_cause: cold key cache after region failover
resolution: Prewarm key cache during failover runbook

symptom: Read replica served stale user permissions
root_cause: replication lag exceeded permission cache TTL
resolution: Route permission reads to primary during lag

symptom: Order status stuck in pending
root_cause: payment callback consumer offset was reset incorrectly
resolution: Restore offset and replay callbacks from checkpoint

symptom: Refund API returned provider unavailable
root_cause: provider endpoint DNS cache kept retired IP
resolution: Lower DNS cache TTL and restart affected pods

symptom: Risk score changed abruptly after model rollout
root_cause: feature normalization version mismatch
resolution: Rollback model and enforce feature schema versioning

symptom: Warehouse sync lag caused oversell
root_cause: warehouse integration rate limit throttled sync worker
resolution: Batch sync requests and request rate limit increase

symptom: Gateway CPU high after route table update
root_cause: regex route pattern triggered excessive backtracking
resolution: Replace regex route and add config lint

symptom: Token Expired errors for enterprise SSO tenants
root_cause: tenant-specific clock skew leeway was removed
resolution: Restore SSO leeway and add tenant regression suite

symptom: Profile update silently dropped phone number
root_cause: API schema mapper ignored nullable field transitions
resolution: Patch mapper and add schema diff alert

symptom: Session cache hit rate collapsed after deploy
root_cause: key prefix changed without migration
resolution: Dual-read old prefix and migrate active sessions

symptom: Key rotation job failed halfway
root_cause: rotation worker crashed without checkpoint resume
resolution: Add checkpoint resume and verify key version parity

symptom: User export job impacted online reads
root_cause: export job bypassed replica routing
resolution: Force export to replica and throttle batch size

symptom: Checkout API returned unauthorized for logged-in users
root_cause: order-service cached expired user-center token
resolution: Refresh service token on 401 and reduce token cache TTL

symptom: Payment service emitted duplicate callbacks
root_cause: callback retry scheduler ignored terminal success state
resolution: Check terminal state before retry dispatch

symptom: Risk endpoint failed after dependency certificate expiry
root_cause: feature store TLS certificate expired
resolution: Rotate feature store certificate and add expiry monitor

symptom: Inventory API returned 404 for known SKU
root_cause: SKU normalization removed leading zeros
resolution: Preserve SKU string identity and backfill normalized index

symptom: Token Expired during password reset flow
root_cause: password reset token used auth-service validation path with wrong issuer
resolution: Separate password reset issuer and add flow-specific validation test
